name: Cambozola Pita Pizzas
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Packages Mini Pita Rounds, Halved Horizontally
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. Spread onions in a shallow baking dish.
3. Dot with butter; sprinkle with brown sugar, balsamic vinegar, salt and pepper.
4. Bake, covered for 30 to 40 minutes, stirring once. (You may cook these ahead of time and store them in the refrigerator.)
5. Near serving time, place pita halves on baking sheets.
6. Top each pita half with a spoonful of onions, Cambozola cheese, and 2 or 4 slivers of sun-dried tomatoes.
7. Preheat oven to 375 degrees just before serving time, bake for 6 to 8 minutes until light brown and bubbly.
8. Makes 50 to 75 pizzas.
